ddls:
CREATE TABLE "robots" (
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robot */,
  "robot_name" TEXT /* Name of the robot */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the robot */,
  "production_line" TEXT /* Production line where the robot is located */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the robot was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the robot */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the robot */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the robot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "joints" (
  "joint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each joint */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot the joint belongs to */,
  "joint_name" TEXT /* Name of the joint (e.g., base, shoulder, elbow) */,
  "degrees_of_freedom" INTEGER /* Degrees of freedom for the joint */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "calibration_interval" INTEGER /* Interval in days for calibration */,
  "max_load" REAL /* Maximum load the joint can handle */,
  "min_load" REAL /* Minimum load the joint can handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("joint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_joints_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the dashboard belongs to */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the dashboard was last modified */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or groups the dashboard is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the chart belongs to */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the chart */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., line, bar, scatter) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data for the chart */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date and time the data was imported */,
  "import_source" TEXT /* Source of the data import (e.g., CSV file, IoT device) */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import */,
  "imported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who imported the data */,
  "import_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the import */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_imported_by FOREIGN KEY ("imported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "rule_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the rule */,
  "rule_status" TEXT /* Status of the rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenances" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot the maintenance belongs to */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date and time the maintenance was scheduled */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the maintenance */,
  "completed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who completed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenances_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenances_completed_by FOREIGN KEY ("completed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robot_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot the performance metric belongs to */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date and time the performance metric was recorded */,
  "performance_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Type of performance metric */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the performance metric */,
  "variance" REAL /* Variance from the target value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_performance_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "productions" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production metric */,
  "production_line" TEXT /* Production line the production metric belongs to */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date and time the production metric was recorded */,
  "production_value" INTEGER /* Value of the production metric */,
  "production_target" INTEGER /* Target production value for the line */,
  "variance" INTEGER /* Variance from the target production value */,
  "downtime" INTEGER /* Downtime in minutes for the production line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_productions_production_line FOREIGN KEY ("production_line") REFERENCES robots ("production_line")
)
